About A Python-based multiplayer Indian Rummy game with support for AI opponents and LAN play. Implements data structures like linked lists, stacks, queues, hashmaps, and graphs to ensure efficient gameplay and intelligent AI decisions.
Rummy Game Agent trained using Reinforcement Learning algorithm.

Rummy 301 Points Counter Tired of scribbling down scores every time we played Rummy 301, I decided to build a simple Java Swing app to keep track of points automatically. Just enter player names, add rounds, and watch the app handle the rest — eliminating players who hit 301 and crowning the last one standing. Easy, fun, and saves paper!

Rummy, especially Indian rummy, is enjoyed by everyone in India above the age of eighteen. And now with technology reaching new heights, you can play rummy, win cash and sharpen your rummy-playing skills online. You can test your skills against players from around the country and beat them to win money!  Playing in Rummy nation is as simple as downloading the app. If you are new to the card game? Don’t worry! It has got you covered with practice games and free coins to feel more confident to earn money from it. It has also provided with rules to get started with.  Play Rummy and experience fun and excitement with the Rummy Nation App! Or you can simply visit www.rummynation.com on your mobile. Educational resources and gameplay guides for popular Indian card games such as Teen Patti, Rummy, and Andar Bahar.
Text based classic Rummy game with an AI that uses ISMCTS. Data Structures and Algorithms course project, University of Helsinki

Indian Rummy game
2 to 4 player indian rummy with some twists

RummyVision is an intelligent card game assistant that combines computer vision with Monte Carlo simulation to help you make better decisions in Rummy. Point your iPhone camera at your hand, and get real-time card recognition and strategic discard suggestions powered by AI.
It is a prototype of my curiosity how ai can be so amazing

A Java implementation of Classic and Gin Rummy featuring full meld/scoring logic and a rule-driven smart AI player. Built on JGameGrid with a clean OOP architecture, GoF design patterns, and configurable game modes. Includes AI card-evaluation logic, turn management, and Gradle-based automated testing for all gameplay scenarios.

Shanko is a strategic family card game that combines classic Rummy mechanics with innovative buying and Joker-swapping features. Play through 7 progressively challenging rounds, form triplets and sequences, and compete against friends or AI opponents. Perfect for families and card game enthusiasts who love strategic depth!

La Mano: Conquian is a modern take on one of the oldest rummy-style card games. Play the classic Mexican game of strategy, memory, and luck. With either offline against AI opponents or online with friends and players around the world.
A modern, web-based implementation of the classic Rummy tile game with real-time multiplayer functionality, AI opponents, and a beautiful tabletop-inspired interface.
A custom environment and trained DQN agent for playing Indian Rummy using RLCard.
Play Jin Rummy with AI
Typescript library for Indian Rummy card game
generic gin rummy app for single player AI or multi player over bluetooth

This project is a recreation of the classic card game Rummy. It features an AI player to play against, a hand of cards that can be dragged and sorted, and a scoreboard that keeps track of multiple rounds.
Scoreboard for Indian Rummy Card Game

Rummy 301 Points Counter Tired of scribbling down scores every time we played Rummy 301, I decided to build a simple Java Swing app to keep track of points automatically. Just enter player names, add rounds, and watch the app handle the rest — eliminating players who hit 301 and crowning the last one standing. Easy, fun, and saves paper!
AI project assigment for playing a 2 person game of Rummy
A hand-rolled neuroevolution AI for gin rummy.

Gin-Rummy-AI-vs-Human is a python-based project the simulates the classic card game Gin Rummy. This game allows user to play against an AI opponent that takes into consideration intricate rules and strategies of the game. The AI opponent employs different tactics based on the gameplay to make the game more challenging and engaging.
A web-based Gin Rummy game and AI

Interactive, digital version of the classic card game Rummy. The project aims to create a user-friendly application that replicates the traditional gameplay experience, allowing users to play against AI opponents or other players online.
A cpp progarm to calculate Rummy points of all the players for each round.

3 plus games is the best online gaming platform in india which offers you unlimited fun with real money, here you can play rummy (point, pool, deal), poker, carrom, ludo, snakes and ladders, 8 ball pool, call break and many more games play and win real money rewards
Rummy game server for game that contain deal rummy and point rummy
